{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320163816BF0A1F2D106B55EF0424"}"},"total":14193},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7265261447503856441","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"刚发现百倍增幅也是作者写的。极其建议这本书用我的人格发誓。这本书是真的无敌文 爽文，不像别的无敌文都有一堆限制，这本书没有。而且真的很搞笑，有趣，作者有自己的大纲，每一次副本都有全新的体验，据我的判断，应该不会烂尾。作者的脑回路真的很大耶！加油，不要让我的判断变成失望。[爱心][爱心][爱心](˃ ⌑ ˂ഃ )"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691575601,"group_id":"7220601411342437411","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不值得理会","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxtjVrIwBqNspbBzZzEpWn8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5a17000e84fb47bca9f2ebeb7e1e6bc5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529503&x-signature=L04gQQdDJuzWso%2BSzeeMumDTGCw%3D","user_id":"81195888680","user_name":"早知道就不注册作家了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"81195888680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220601411342437411","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏都市+外挂自选+无敌+搞笑不正经+主角无下限，比反派还反派，圣母勿入】
卡带世界，逃逸数据，幻游暗境，电竞者......
林天穿越游戏都市，在这里，游戏成为全世界争相角逐的主题。
通用货币是游戏点卡，地位权势看的是段位等级，
超凡能力，珍宝异品，奇宠异兽，佣兵仆从......
一切，皆可通过进入游戏卡带世界获得！
穿越至此，
只想认真打游戏的林天却是被迫成了开挂选手。
【检测到宿主进入卡带世界：植物大战僵尸】
【系统正在分配游戏外挂，请在以下三个外挂中做出选择】
【1.无限阳光：可以随意进行植物种植】
【2.百倍掉落：掉落植物卡片的概率提升百倍】
【3.植物改造：你可以消耗阳光对植物进行改造】
“统子哥，不选行不行？”
【系统:不行啊宿子哥，我这边是有业绩要求的】
当电竞者们撕破脸皮争抢资源时......
当各大势力发动战争互相屠戮厮杀时......
林天站在最高处，蓦然发现，
这硕大的游戏都市中，
竟只有自己一人，在单纯享受游戏带来的快乐。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8f80df966e7f9bee2b86203d1fd3094b","author":"未灭","author_id":"","book_id":"7220601411342437411","book_name":"全球电竞时代，我是唯一作弊玩家","book_short_name":"游戏卡带世界","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7220602106959364623","read_count":"115191","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1346026"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"600","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,无敌,打脸,魂穿,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/76cf1d004f668aed8251303079854787~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179896&x-signature=fZrmKpwdgA34YgNuENcK1g5wiOI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"131589287463741","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.26
